description: Natural language wallet management agent supporting balance queries, SUI transfers, and complex percentage splits.
author: cridiv

supported_intents.balance: Retrieve on-chain SUI balance from the agent NFA vault or operator fallback
supported_intents.transfer: Send SUI to a single recipient
supported_intents.distribute: Calculate percentage allocations and split remaining balance across multiple targets

operational_modes.automatic: Execute automatically when triggered by trusted off-chain signals
